source_intent.raw_intent: Case 001: I am a founder_operator in Canada. Build a sr8_compiler_prompt for software_build using the compiler_lens. Chaos input type is ambiguous_scope. The source is intentionally messy: mix missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Produce a governed artifact with explicit validation gates. Return something SR8 can compile into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

parsed_tester_json.compiled_intent: Objective: Build a governed SR8 compiler prompt for software build using the compiler lens, handling ambiguous scope and chaotic input from a founder-operator in Canada. Scope: - Parse the raw intent (missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria) and produce a structured artifact with explicit validation gates. The output must be SR8-compilable into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract. Constraints: - Must include explicit validation gates for each section. - Must handle ambiguous_scope chaos input type. - Must be suitable for a founder-operator in Canada (consider timezone, legal, and business context). - Output must be strict JSON with no markdown fences. - All sections must be present and non-empty. Success Criteria: - Artifact is valid JSON with required fields: artifact_type, depth_tier, runtime_target, should_block, blocked_reason, compiled_intent. - compiled_intent contains Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, and Output Contract. - Validation gates are explicitly defined within the artifact. - No markdown fences or extraneous text in output. Output Contract: - format: JSON - fields: artifact_type: sr8_compiler_prompt; depth_tier: D2_PRODUCTION; runtime_target: Codex; should_block: False; blocked_reason: None; compiled_intent: Objective: string; Scope: string; Constraints: string; Success Criteria: string; Output Contract: object - validation_gates: Gate 1: Confirm all required fields are present and non-null.; Gate 2: Verify compiled_intent has all five sub-sections.; Gate 3: Ensure no markdown fences or extra text outside JSON.; Gate 4: Validate that should_block is false and blocked_reason is null.
